docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIINO JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS PAMELA $290.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $305.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $290.00 FILED BY SIINO JOE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS PAMELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS PAMELA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS PAMELA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEWIS PAMELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SIINO JOE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $500.00 FILED BY LEWIS PAMELA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SIINO JOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $337.23 AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS PAMELA
